modules.summary: Camera utilities — clip-plane adjustment (mirror of mayatk's ``cam_utils``).

functions.name: adjust_camera_clipping
functions.summary: Adjust near/far clip planes of camera object(s) — mirror of ``mtk.adjust_camera_clipping``.

classes.name: CamUtils
classes.summary: Namespace mirror of mayatk's ``CamUtils`` (helper also exposed module-level).

modules.summary: Core blendertk utilities — DCC-environment info + cross-cutting decorators.

functions.name: undoable
functions.summary: Wrap ``fn`` so its changes collapse into a single Blender undo step.

functions.name: get_env_info
functions.summary: Return Blender scene / environment info (mirror of ``mtk.get_env_info``).

modules.summary: Mesh-editing utilities — reduce/decimate, coplanar dissolve, triangulate / tris-to-quads,

functions.name: decimate
functions.summary: Reduce mesh density via a Decimate (COLLAPSE) modifier — mirror of ``mtk.EditUtils.decimate``.

functions.name: dissolve_coplanar
functions.summary: Dissolve near-coplanar faces via a Decimate (PLANAR) modifier — mirror of

functions.name: triangulate
functions.summary: Triangulate all faces of the given mesh object(s) (bmesh, headless).

functions.name: tris_to_quads
functions.summary: Merge adjacent triangles back into quads where the face/shape angle is within ``angle``

functions.name: subdivide_mesh
functions.summary: Subdivide every edge ``cuts`` times, grid-filling faces (bmesh, headless) — "Add Divisions".

functions.name: set_subdivision
functions.summary: Set Subdivision-Surface levels on the given mesh object(s), kept **live** (non-destructive

functions.name: set_shading
functions.summary: Set smooth (averaged vertex normals) or flat (face normals) shading on all faces — the

functions.name: set_edge_hardness
functions.summary: Smooth-shade, then mark edges **sharp** where the dihedral angle ≥ ``angle`` degrees —

functions.name: flip_normals
functions.summary: Reverse face winding / normals (bmesh ``reverse_faces``, headless).

functions.name: recalculate_normals
functions.summary: Recalculate consistent face normals, outward by default / inward if ``inside`` (bmesh).

functions.name: clean_geometry
functions.signature: (objects, *, merge=True, merge_distance=0.0001, delete_loose=True, degenerate=True, recalculate=True, fill_holes=False)
functions.summary: Clean mesh geometry — merge doubles, dissolve degenerate (zero-area) faces, remove loose

functions.name: crease_edges
functions.summary: Set Subdivision-Surface edge crease on the given mesh object(s) — mirror of Maya's

classes.name: EditUtils
classes.summary: Namespace mirror of mayatk's ``EditUtils`` (helpers also exposed module-level).

modules.summary: Node / datablock utilities — instancing via shared object data.

functions.name: get_instances
functions.summary: Return objects that share their data with another object (Maya-style instances).

functions.name: replace_with_instances
functions.summary: Make ``objects[1:]`` instances of ``objects[0]`` by sharing its data — Blender's linked

functions.name: uninstance
functions.summary: Break the instance link — make each object's data single-user (mirror of ``mtk.uninstance``).

classes.name: NodeUtils
classes.summary: Namespace mirror of mayatk's ``NodeUtils`` (instance helpers also exposed module-level).

modules.summary: UV utilities — UV-coordinate translation and UV-set cleanup (mirror of mayatk's ``UvUtils``

functions.name: move_uvs
functions.summary: Translate the UVs of the given mesh object(s) by ``(du, dv)`` — "move to UV space"

functions.name: delete_extra_uv_sets
functions.summary: Remove all but the first UV map on the given mesh object(s) — "Cleanup UV Sets".

classes.name: UvUtils
classes.summary: Namespace mirror of mayatk's ``UvUtils`` (helpers also exposed module-level).

modules.summary: Transform utilities — object-level transform ops (world bbox, freeze, drop-to-grid,

functions.name: get_world_bbox
functions.summary: Return ``(min, max)`` ``Vector``s of ``obj``'s bounding box in world space.

functions.name: freeze_transforms
functions.summary: Apply (bake) the given transform channels into the object data — Blender's

functions.name: drop_to_grid
functions.summary: Drop each object so its bbox ``Min`` / ``Mid`` / ``Max`` sits on the ground (Z=0).

functions.name: center_pivot
functions.summary: Move each object's origin (Blender's single pivot) — mirror of Maya's Center Pivot.

functions.name: get_pivot_modes
functions.summary: Center-pivot mode keys understood by :func:`center_pivot`.

functions.name: match_scale
functions.summary: Uniformly rescale ``source`` object(s) to match ``target``'s bounding-box size.

functions.name: move_to
functions.summary: Move ``source`` object(s) so their pivot aligns with the ``target``'s pivot point.

classes.name: XformUtils
classes.summary: Namespace mirror of mayatk's ``XformUtils`` (helpers also exposed module-level).
